title: Checkout redesign
summary: Decision report for the checkout UX changes. Each audience receives a focused view of the same evidence.

changes.title: Payment summary is now persistent
changes.summary: The basket summary remains visible while the user edits payment details.
changes.problem: Users lost context when scrolling between payment fields and basket details.
changes.decision: Keep the summary visible in the right column on desktop and above the payment form on mobile.
choices: Use a collapsible summary on mobile
Return to the previous compact basket
changes.risk: Mobile height must be checked on small devices.
